title: The Transformer
author: Zachary Proser
description: Every frontier model — GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama — is this one circuit, photocopied. A complete working drawing with a schematic for every part: tokens, attention, multi-head, positional encoding, the block, sampling, and scale.

blueprint.subject: ATTENTION
blueprint.subtitle: Every frontier model — GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama — is this one circuit, photocopied. Here is the full schematic.
